title: February 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 26''' is the 57th day of the year. There are 308 days remaining (309 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1970]] – [[National Public Radio]] is founded.
*[[1972]] – [[Keith Ferguson]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Veronica Ngo]] is born.
*[[1980]] – ''[[Bring Me the Children]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*1980 – [[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]] published.
*[[1991]] – [[Max Lloyd Jones]] is born.
*[[1993]] – [[Jake Bartok]] is born.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' published.
*2003 – [[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] published.
*2003 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 3]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Covetous]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – [[Richard Devon]] dies.
*2010 – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 3: Uncertain Surrender]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[2011]] – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 3DS|Nintendo 3DS]] is launched.
*[[2013]] – [[The Last Jedi (novel)|''The Last Jedi'']] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Legacy (2013) 12|''Legacy'' (2013) 12]] published.
*2014 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 8]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – "[[Wolves and a Door]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2018 – "[[A World Between Worlds]]" airs on Disney XD.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The Saga Begins]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 3|''Star Wars'' (2020) 3]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation 1|''The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation'' 1]] published.
<noinclude>
